---
title: "flag Legend Table"
output: pdf_document
---


```{r, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tibble)
library(kableExtra)

flag_legend <- tibble::tibble(
  Flag = c(
    "no.hit",
    "ac50.lowconc",
    "border",
    "low.nconc",
    "acc.high",
    "glns.lowconc",
    "singlept.hit.mid",
    "multipoint.neg"
  ),
  Meaning = c(
    "hitcall < 0.9",
    "AC50 < lowest tested concentration",
    "Borderline activity with top <= 1.2*cutoff and top >= 0.8*cutoff",
    "Number of concentrations tested is less than 4",
    "ACC > AC50, indication of high baseline variability",
    "Complete gain-loss curve not within concentration range tested",
    "Only 1 concentration above baseline, active",
    "Multiple concentrations above baseline, inactive"
  )
)

flag_legend %>%
  kable("latex", booktabs = TRUE, caption = "Flag Legend Table") %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"))
```
